author: anon-a7c6025f
content:
Root cause found: lower_fused_elementwise only loads the first input (line 553). apply_op_expr only handles unary ops — binary ops (Add/Sub/Mul/Div) return None. The fix:
1. Add apply_binary_op_expr that takes two operands 
2. Extend lower_fused_elementwise to load ALL inputs at loop start
3. For binary ops, reference the second input; for unary, chain the accumulator
4. Remove the all_unary gate in lower_to_loops so mixed chains get fused
